chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The Equipment of the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/460)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/460)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لِعَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) إِيَّاكَ أَنْ تَرْكَبَ مِيثَرَةً حَمْرَاءَ فَإِنَّهَا مِيثَرَةُ إِبْلِيسَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, form Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hanan Bin Sadeyr who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The Prophet<sup>saww</sup> said to Ali<sup>asws</sup>: ‘Beware of riding on a red saddlecloth, for it is a saddlecloth of Satan<sup>la</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from his father from Hanan ibn Sadir who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, once said to Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘You must never use a red saddlecloth; it is the saddlecloth of Satan.’”
